about: Variant seed file for emulator (same shape as export-registered-variants). Required: "rows" array. Each element: "taskId" (string), "taskData" (object: task root fields like description, name, registered, image), "variants" (non-empty array of { "id": variant doc id, "data": { name, registered, params, ... } }). Omit lastUpdated; seed sets server timestamps. Default seed: emulator_scripts/seeders/default-variant-seed.json. Export from admin: npm --prefix functions/local run export-registered-variants.
